name: Tomato and Liver Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Onion, cut into wedges (1 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tomatoes into wedges (makes about 2 cups); set aside.
2. Cut liver into 1/2-inch wide strips; set aside.
3. In a medium bowl, combine soy sauce, sherry, cornstarch, sugar, salt, and ginger.
4. Add liver to the marinade; marinate for 15 to 20 minutes.
5. In a medium skillet or wok, heat 2 tablespoons of water.
6. Add liver and marinade to the skillet. Cook and stir until partially cooked, about 2 minutes.
7. Remove from skillet and set aside.
8. To the skillet, add the remaining 2 tablespoons water.
9. Add onions; cook and stir until onions are crisp and tender, about 3 minutes.
10. Add tomatoes; cook and stir until tomatoes are tender, 1 minute.
11. Add reserved liver and marinade; cook and stir until meat is cooked but still pink in the center, about 2 minutes.
12. Serve with cooked rice if desired.
Serves 4.
